title: Fried Rice with Fluffy Twist
description: A simple and delicious fried rice dish with a fluffy twist, perfect for a quick weeknight meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the leftover fried rice and stir-fry until heated through.
In a separate bowl, scramble 2 eggs and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Push the fried rice to one side of the skillet.
Add the scrambled eggs to the empty side of the skillet and scramble until cooked through.
Mix the eggs with the fried rice.
Add the day-old fluffy rice to the skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
